title: triodia decumbens var. breviglumis
intro: Triodia decumbens var. breviglumis, also known as blue grass, is a type of grass that is native to Australia and is a variant of the Triodia decumbens species. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian Indigenous medicine, and it is said to possess medicinal properties that aid in wound healing and inflammation reduction. The health benefits of blue grass include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, teas, and poultices, and it is also used in traditional Australian Indigenous rituals and ceremonies.
